response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with strong recent TypeScript/Node.js work and active AI-agent infrastructure contributions (MCP code generators) directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Background spans multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C/C++, Python-adjacent), databases (MongoDB, MySQL), cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, and React. Strong testing/TDD culture and teaching experience signal solid engineering practices. Lacks explicit Nest.js and Vitest exposure, and no PostgreSQL or Kotlin mentioned, but the foundation makes ramp-up low-risk.
strengths: Recent hands-on AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work aligns with a key requirement
Strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js + React + MongoDB + AWS experience
Deep TDD, testing, and architecture background with proven craftsmanship
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in primary stack
Kotlin and PostgreSQL not mentioned despite being called out in the JD
Significant time invested in DLang/niche stacks may signal divergent tooling preferences
